scenes.narration: Merit letters go out soon. You still haven't checked who's below minimum — or whether a manager earns less than their team. Shift Works HR ends that weekly fire drill.
Just export from Workday, UKG, or ADP and drop the file in. We map your columns automatically. No reformatting. No IT project.
About a minute later, you know what has to be fixed before you lock the cycle. Critical flags, range penetration, and real merit pool math for finance.
This is what your VP will ask about. Every person below minimum — name, department, dollar gap — plus manager inversions and compression sitting right next to them.
Need to brief your CHRO? One export gives you a PDF with risk level, budget exposure, and the findings they'll actually ask about.
Try it with your own roster at shiftworkshr.com. Free to start — no credit card.
